name: No-Bake Marshmallow-Chip Clusters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the butter. Stir in 3-1/4 cups of marshmallows until melted. Turn off the heat, then add vanilla.
2. In a large bowl, mix together peanuts, raisins, and pretzels. Add the marshmallow mixture and stir to coat. Let cool slightly and add the remaining marshmallows and chocolate chips.
3. Spray your hands with cooking spray and roll the mixture into haystacks or ball-shapes. Place on waxed paper lined baking sheets. Chill until set.
